TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Minse ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 13 buwan, 69 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 39% kyan ku 7 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 61% kyan ku 42 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, 10/13 . maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Minse hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Minse hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Minse hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Minse hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Minse hya' ga Trayan. tay mkyahu' na Minse hya' ga Lwax khu'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč mins~…ēe …£a nija mki s~…ēku s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik keŇč atu …£pńßo …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku * ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, **/** . maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na mins~…ēe ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na mins~…ēe ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na mins~…ēe ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na mins~…ēe ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na mins~…ēe ńßja Ē …£a trajan. taj mkjańßu Ē na mins~…ēe ńßja Ē …£a lwax kńßu Ē. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Minse ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 13 buwan, 69 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 39% kyan ku 7 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 61% kyan ku 42 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, 10/13 . maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Minse hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Minse hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Minse hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Minse hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Minse hya' ga Trayan. tay mkyahu' na Minse hya' ga Lwax khu'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč mins~…ēe …£a nija mki s~…ēku s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik keŇč atu …£pńßo …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku * ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, **/** . maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na mins~…ēe ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na mins~…ēe ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na mins~…ēe ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na mins~…ēe ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na mins~…ēe ńßja Ē …£a trajan. taj mkjańßu Ē na mins~…ēe ńßja Ē …£a lwax kńßu Ē. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
